response.justification: Candidate is a web/full-stack software developer with no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, GPU architecture, deep neural network optimization, or hardware-software co-design. The resume centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web platforms — none of which align with the Principal Performance Architect role focused on cloud hardware optimization for AI accelerators. Educational background (BS in CS) with strong experience exists, but the technical domain mismatch is severe.
strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) as a senior/staff software engineer
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning, GPU architecture, or DNN optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD architecture or hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: Senior IC experience and engineering rigor
